# Maria Madeira

> Maria Madeira is a growth strategist for brands that sell online, covering website strategy, AI search (Answer Engine Optimisation), email marketing and Klaviyo, paid acquisition, and creative direction. Based in Lisbon, working globally.

Verified results from recent engagements include £134K in email-attributed revenue over 12 months (up 88.9% year on year, 37.8% of total store revenue), a 50.4% average campaign open rate, and Google Ads at a 5.34x return on ad spend.

## Services
- [Website Strategy & Build](https://mariamadeira.com/services/websites): strategy, rebuilds and targeted improvements with SEO and AEO built in from the start.
- [Answer Engine Optimisation (AEO)](https://mariamadeira.com/services/aeo): getting cited and recommended by AI assistants such as ChatGPT, Perplexity, Gemini and Google AI Overviews.
- [Email Marketing & Klaviyo Consulting](https://mariamadeira.com/services/email-marketing): lifecycle flows, segmentation and campaigns that turn email into a compounding, attributed-revenue channel.
- [All services](https://mariamadeira.com/services): the full list, including growth strategy, paid advertising, creative direction and e-commerce platform migration.

## Case studies
- [Email lifecycle revenue growth](https://mariamadeira.com/case-study-email): a Klaviyo lifecycle system that grew email-attributed revenue to £134K over 12 months.
- [Google Ads revenue growth](https://mariamadeira.com/case-study-google-ads): structured campaigns delivering a 5.34x return on ad spend.
- [SEO & platform migration](https://mariamadeira.com/case-study-seo): recovering organic and answer-engine visibility after a WordPress to Shopify migration.
- [The Bodysurf School](https://mariamadeira.com/case-study-bodysurf-school): a brochure site rebuilt into a bilingual booking engine with SEO and AEO foundations.
- [Click & Collect](https://mariamadeira.com/case-study-click-collect): a mobile pre-order experience for a high-traffic retail store.

## Writing
- [What is AEO? Answer Engine Optimisation explained](https://mariamadeira.com/blog/what-is-aeo): how brands get cited by AI answer engines, how AEO differs from SEO and GEO, and where to start.
